title: I don't like Fox news but I think it's funny

transcript.text: Hello, hello. I just wanted to put my two cents in again about what I think about Fox News. I'm not a supporter of Fox News. I do not like Fox News, although I laugh at Fox News.

I think it's funny. I'm traveling now, and I wanted to see Amsterdam. I just wanted to see videos of Amsterdam and stuff, so I type Amsterdam, and I see Amsterdam Fox News, and it's Bill O'Reilly with some, like, pretty blonde girl.

But there they're going back and forth agreeing with each other, talking about how much they hate Amsterdam for, like, eight minutes, because, like, I guess, you know, Amsterdam, they have prostitution's legal, and, like, marijuana and mushrooms are legal there, you know, and it's, like, a pre-culture.
And I had never been to Amsterdam at the time, but I was just laughing at them, because they're, like, so pissed off in Amsterdam.

And he's trying to talk, like, how Amsterdam is just this hellhole, you know, of, like, all this crime, and it's just the perfect example of how, of how, why we don't want to legalize marijuana, because then we'll have, like, all the crime that was in Amsterdam.

And I was there, like, three or four days, and Amsterdam is like a, is like I died and went to heaven. I love Amsterdam. It's like disco city, dancing. I mean, yeah, you see wasted people, but, I mean, it's because it's the party town.
You're supposed to get wasted when you go to Amsterdam. And my brother said he got charged by some druggie once or whatever, and I heard some other stories, but I didn't see anything.

And it was, like, awesome. And people riding their bikes everywhere. I mean, more bikes than cars, you know, and, you know, I mean, I couldn't, I had trouble, like, locking my bike up anywhere, because there was, like, so many bikes. It was just awesome.

You know, and, like, nudity doesn't mean anything there, like, it's, like, amazing. And, uh, so anyway, he's, like, Bill O'Reilly's, like, yeah, all the only druggies go there, like, and I don't even know why they go there.

And they're just, but they just made that up. And then somebody, you know, it was actually somebody who uploaded it was, like, a Dutch person saying that, like, only 20% of Dutch even smoked weed in their life, which is bullshit.
I don't know where they got that statistic, but 40% of Americans smoked weed. And, um, I was just, like, but, I mean, it's clear that they're not stoned off their asses there.

I was probably the highest person there. The tourists are the highest people there. You know, people smoke weed, or a certain kind of people who like to smoke weed, and other people, they just don't smoke weed, you know, like, because they just don't like being high, you know, or whatever.
It's, like, I don't know what it is. Personality thing, genetic thing, whatever, but it was just funny how they're just spreading all this bullshit that they have no idea what they're talking about.
I was on the impression that this guy, Bill O'Reilly, has never even, like, left the country. He probably hasn't.

And I think, like, Fox News and those other people, like Ann Coulter and the people they have on there, and they're angry, by the way. They're really angry, and they think that, like, the world's going to hell.

These people have, I don't think these people have ever traveled, and if they did, they'd probably be, like, scared, thinking they'd get, like, mugged or something, you know, because, like, people from other countries are, like, bad or something.
But, like, like, I understand why people from other countries would not like Americans, like, why they have problems with America, like Bush and Fox News and stuff.

Because, like, those people, those Fox News people, they think America's, like, you know, the best country in the world because they have, like, you know, free market, or, you know, and everybody else is, like, like, backward.
But they're not, they're totally into, they're fascists and Nazis. They're totally into, like, they want to, like, regulate everything, you know.
And if you don't make weed illegal and abortion illegal and everything illegal, then, like, you know, all the weeds of the people will grow and take over and the demons will take over.
And kind of, like, the fear-based, fundamentalist Christians, I guess, would listen to Fox News, like, they think that the world is going to hell and all this stuff.
But when I saw that guy, Bill Riley, I was just laughing.
I mean, and my brother was actually saying the same thing, like, when he, because I don't watch Fox News much, I don't watch TV, so I was just someone watching it then.
But my brother was saying, like, when he watches Fox News, it's kind of, like, funny.
It's, like, watching, like, those spoof radio shows or whatever on Grand Theft Auto.
It's, like, it's, like, are they even serious, you know, when they're talking like this?
It's, like, angry, you know, telling people to shut up and all this stuff.
And it's, uh, it just cracks me up.
But you would never see Fox News anywhere outside of America.
Outside of America, they play CNN, because CNN, those are, like, the intelligent people who talk news.

Fox News is more like Fox, Fox, like, it's like, uh, propaganda of, like, the Nazis before World War II, like, dropping leaflets, you know, who didn't raten, like, the Jewish rats, you know, like, that's what Fox News is all about.
It's, it's like the reincarnations of the Nazis from World War II, you know.
Um, but it's funny, they crack me up.
Um, so anyways, I think people, some people may be, like, threatened by Fox News, but I don't think it's anything to be threatened by.
I don't know how many people watch Fox News, but the people who do watch Fox News and that kind of stuff are, like, they're not very influential people, I don't think.

Like, I think statistically, like, fundamentalist Christians and, like, very uneducated and not very, um, I mean, well, they are, I mean, they do kind of come together, and that's why they have the political power, because they come together in their church, you know, to put, make everything illegal, you know, and throw everybody else in jail.
But, but, um, you know, once more than 40% of Americans start voting, you know, and everybody votes, then at Fox News, those kinds of people are just going to fade away.
So it's just kind of, it's just funny, it cracks me up.

They have, like, music videos in all the bars with, like, video after video, and I haven't seen a music video for years in America.
